name: Price Communications Corporation
description: Price Communications Corporation is an American company that has historically operated as a nationwide communications entity. Throughout its history, the firm has been involved in owning and subsequently disposing of a diverse portfolio of assets, including television stations, radio stations, newspapers, and cellular telephone systems. Headquartered in New York, the company has focused on managing and strategically divesting various communications and related properties to maximize value. While it once operated cellular telephone systems across several states in the southeastern United States, its primary business model has centered on the acquisition and divestiture of media and telecommunications interests.
